surface_verification.justification: Docs-only change to .shipwright/agent_docs markdown (architecture.md, conventions.md). No runtime / UI / API / store / message-contract code touched (git diff = only those two docs + the iterate spec), so there is no web surface to drive. The sole automated contract over these docs is the client doc-sync.test.ts file-map token gate, which is green.

degraded: Full client+server regression suite not re-run: zero source files changed, so no code path is affected. Relevant gate = the 3 tests that read these docs (doc-sync 55, virtualizerSizeCache 17, tree-route 12 = 84/84 green).

check_iterate_isolation.py absent from this plugin cache (shared/scripts/tools) - F0/F11 leak-guard verified manually: changes contained to the .worktrees/agent-docs-condense worktree branch; main tree clean.

behaviors.behavior: Every doc-sync REQUIRED_TOKEN still resolves in the bundle (CLAUDE.md + architecture.md + component_inventory.md)
